name: Raven

traits.name: Mimicry
traits.text: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a whisper or chitter. A hearer can discern the sounds are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.

text:
# Raven

A clever black-feathered mimic of voices.

*Tiny Beast, Unaligned*
